description: A compliance audit of clinical trial user access has identified several issues that must be remediated immediately. As the Clinical Data Manager (login: root / Admin123!), update the access controls in OpenClinica. Change the role for user 'mrivera' to 'monitor' in the Phase II Diabetes Trial and the Asthma Prevention Pilot study (AP-PILOT-2022). Remove user 'lchang' from the Cardiovascular Outcomes Registry. Create a new user account for Kavya Patel (username: kpatel, email: k.patel@clinical-research.org, institution: Stanford Medical Center) and assign them the 'investigator' role in the Phase II Diabetes Trial.
